title: Gupy.io Jobs Scraper
description: Collect job listings from the public Gupy portal. Use a Gupy search URL for exact portal filters or use keyword and location for a simpler setup.

url.title: Gupy search URL
url.description: A URL from portal.gupy.io/job-search. If provided, the actor uses the filters from this URL first.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Optional job keyword when you do not want to use a full Gupy URL.

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional city or state, for example Sao Paulo, Sao Paulo - SP, or Pernambuco.

sortBy.title: Sort by
sortBy.description: Sort order used when you build the search from keyword and location.

results_wanted.title: Results wanted
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect.

max_pages.title: Max pages
max_pages.description: Safety limit for paginated API requests.
